allow: Bash(node -e " const fs = require\('fs'\); const files = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('./questions/manifest.json'\)\); files.forEach\(f => { const qs = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('./questions/' + f\)\); qs.filter\(q => q.subtype === 'code_blank' || q.subtype === 'code_result' || q.type === 'short'\) .slice\(0,8\).forEach\(q => console.log\(q.subtype||q.type, '|', JSON.stringify\(q.answer\)\)\); }\); ")
